app.name: Time Mapper
places.title: Places
places.empty.title: No places yet
places.empty.body: Save the places that matter — home, work, the gym — and Time Mapper tracks your visits automatically.
timeline.fab.startHere.hint: Opens a new tracked entry for this place.
timeline.empty.title: No entries yet. Add a place to start tracking automatically.
timeline.emptyNoPlaces.title: Add a place to start tracking
timeline.emptyNoPlaces.body: Pick a place you visit often. Time Mapper logs the rest automatically.
timeline.emptyTrackedReady.title: You're set up.
timeline.emptyTrackedReady.body: Visits to your places will appear here automatically.
timeline.fab.addEntry.hint: Opens the entry editor for a manual time block.
stats.title: This week
stats.upsell.title: Past weeks with Pro
stats.upsell.body: Browse full history and export CSV.
settings.title: Settings
settings.dev.simulate.empty.title: No places yet
settings.dev.simulate.empty.body: Add a place first, then come back to simulate a visit.
settings.dev.simulate.picker.title: Simulate a 30s visit
onboarding.welcome.title: Time Mapper
onboarding.welcome.body: Private, automatic time tracking for the places that matter.
onboarding.permissions.title: Always location
onboarding.permissions.body: Time Mapper watches for entry and exit of your places in the background. Your location stays on your device — nothing is ever uploaded.
onboarding.permissions.privacy: Your location never leaves this device.
onboarding.firstPlace.title: Your first place
onboarding.firstPlace.body: Add one place — home, the office, your gym — and Time Mapper will log your visits automatically.
notifier.opened.title: Started tracking
notifier.closed.title: Stopped tracking
notifier.consolidated.title: {{count}} transitions
notifier.channel.name: Tracking
notifier.digest.title: Your daily summary is ready
notifier.digest.body: Tap to see yesterday's totals by place.
stats.ledger.title: Ledger
stats.ledger.hint: Tap any row to edit · swipe table to scroll
paywall.pausedForm.title: Paused
paywall.pausedForm.body: Your place is waiting — continue after upgrading, or cancel to go back.
tracking.banner.stale.body: We haven't observed any geofence events recently. Your device may be limiting background activity.
settings.data.export.unavailable: Sharing is not available on this device.
settings.data.backup.detail: Save everything to a file you can keep safe
settings.data.telemetry.enabledNote: Crash reports enabled — takes effect on next launch.
settings.data.telemetry.disabledNote: Crash reports disabled — takes effect on next launch.
settings.data.reset.detail: Removes every place, entry and preference
settings.data.reset.confirmBody: This removes every place, entry, and preference. You can't undo this.
settings.data.reset.doubleBody: Everything will be deleted. This can't be recovered.
tracking.banner.foregroundOnly: Auto-tracking is paused. Enable Always location in Settings.
tracking.banner.denied: Auto-tracking is off. Turn on location access in Settings.
tracking.placeLimit.title: Limit reached
tracking.placeLimit.body: Time Mapper currently supports up to 20 tracked places. Remove one to add another.
addPlace.search.hint: Start typing to search for an address.
addPlace.search.errorBody: Try again in a moment, or enter the address manually.
addPlace.suggestion.hint: Double tap to pick this address and continue.
addPlace.field.name: Name
addPlace.field.radius.hint: Swipe up or down to change the radius.
addPlace.delete.title: Delete place?
addPlace.delete.body: This removes the place from your list. Entries are kept.
addPlace.map.unavailable: Map preview available in the dev build.
addPlace.map.accessibilityLabel: Map preview centered on the selected address.
paywall.title: Time Mapper Pro
paywall.hero.title: Track every place that matters.
paywall.hero.body: Pro gives you unlimited places, full history, and CSV export.
paywall.error.title: Purchase failed
paywall.error.pricingNotLoaded: Pricing isn't loaded yet. Please try again in a moment.
paywall.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
stats.empty.week: No tracked time yet this week
settings.buffers.title: Default buffers
settings.buffers.body: New places start with these entry and exit delays. Existing places keep their own settings.
settings.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.notifications.body: Silence arrival and departure alerts during a window each day. Entries still track silently.
entryEdit.label.notePlaceholder: Optional description — e.g. standup, commute, client call
entryEdit.overlap.title: Overlap detected
entryEdit.overlap.body: This entry overlaps {{count}} existing entries. Replace them or keep both?
proUpsell.headline: Unlimited places, full history, CSV.
errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: Time Mapper hit an unexpected error. Tap Restart to recover — your data is safe on-device.
legal.privacy.title: Privacy policy
legal.terms.title: Terms of service
legal.impressum.title: Impressum
